MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF 222 KEARNY PROPEERTY, LP'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.

Jeffrey M. Cohon of the Law Offices of Jeffrey M. Cohon (310.231.4470) and Kevin P. Dwight of Manatt Phelps & Phillips, LLP (415.294.7464) for defendant and opposing party; Kevin Montee of Montee & Associates (925.979.5579) for plaintiff and moving party.

Argued. The Court will rule on evidentiary objections. Defense to file its objections by April 12, 2018, at which time the matter will be taken under submission. Counsel are to email the clerk a list of agreeable dates that the parties would be available to participate in a settlement conference. Judge: Anne Christine Massullo, Clerk: E.
